---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Alos Diallo"
date: "2026-01-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
## ── 1) LIBRARIES & DATA LOADING ──────────────────────────────────────────────
library(HiTIMED)
library(EpiDISH)
library(tidyverse)

# Use your defined paths
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
beta_rds     <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache/beta_comb_qc.rds")

if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) stop("Beta cache not found at: ", beta_rds)
cache_obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
beta_comb <- if (is.list(cache_obj)) cache_obj$beta else cache_obj

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

## ── 2) RUN DECONVOLUTIONS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

# A) EpiScore (EpiDISH) - Generic 3-component reference
data(centEpiFibIC.m)
common_epi <- intersect(rownames(beta_comb), rownames(centEpiFibIC.m))

msg("Running EpiScore (RPC)...")
out.rpc <- epidish(beta_comb[common_epi, ], centEpiFibIC.m[common_epi, ], method = "RPC")
# Keeping scale at 0-1 for fractions
epi_df  <- as.data.frame(out.rpc$estF) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID")

# B) HiTIMED Level 6 (COAD) - Specific Tumor reference
msg("Running HiTIMED h=6 (COAD, tumor=TRUE)...")
hitimed_raw <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb, "COAD", h = 6) 
hitimed_df  <- as.data.frame(hitimed_raw) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID")

# Ensure HiTIMED is on a 0-1 scale (decimal)
hitimed_numeric <- hitimed_df %>% select(where(is.numeric))
if (max(hitimed_numeric, na.rm = TRUE) > 1.1) {
  hitimed_df <- hitimed_df %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ .x / 100))
}

## ── 3) MAPPING & SUMMARY STATISTICS ─────────────────────────────────────────

# We define "Total Epithelial" for HiTIMED as Tumor + Epithelial
compare_df <- left_join(
  epi_df %>% select(SampleID, EpiScore_Epi = Epi, EpiScore_Fib = Fib, EpiScore_IC = IC),
  hitimed_df %>% mutate(HiTIMED_TotalEpi = Tumor + Epithelial) %>% 
             select(SampleID, HiTIMED_TotalEpi, HiTIMED_Tumor = Tumor, HiTIMED_NormalEpi = Epithelial),
  by = "SampleID"
)

# Calculate Summary Stats for both
summary_stats <- compare_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -SampleID, names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Val") %>%
  group_by(Metric) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean   = mean(Val),
    Median = median(Val),
    SD     = sd(Val),
    Min    = min(Val),
    Max    = max(Val),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

print("--- Summary Statistics: Comparison of Proportions ---")
print(summary_stats)

## ── 4) BOXPLOTS: EPITHELIAL VALIDATION ──────────────────────────────────────

# Long format for plotting
plot_df <- compare_df %>%
  select(SampleID, EpiScore_Epi, HiTIMED_TotalEpi) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -SampleID, names_to = "Method", values_to = "Proportion")

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Method, y = Proportion, fill = Method)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.3) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Epithelial Validation: HiTIMED vs. EpiScore",
       subtitle = "HiTIMED Total Epi = (Tumor + Epithelial) | EpiScore = Epi",
       y = "Fraction (0 - 1)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("EpiScore_Epi" = "#4DAF4A", "HiTIMED_TotalEpi" = "#377EB8"))

## ── 5) SCATTER PLOT: CORRELATION ─────────────────────────────────────────────

cor_val <- cor(compare_df$EpiScore_Epi, compare_df$HiTIMED_TotalEpi)

ggplot(compare_df, aes(x = EpiScore_Epi, y = HiTIMED_TotalEpi)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.2, y = 0.8, label = paste0("R = ", round(cor_val, 3)), size = 5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Correlation of Epithelial Estimates",
       x = "EpiScore (Epi)",
       y = "HiTIMED (Tumor + Epithelial)")
```


```{r}
## ── EWAS & DECONVOLUTION VALIDATION ──────────────────────────────────────────
# Purpose: Compare HiTIMED (h=6) with EpiScore (centEpiFibIC.m) 
# Target: Colorectal Cancer (COAD) 
# Date: 2026-01-26
## ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi)
  library(sesame)
  library(ENmix)
  library(matrixStats)
  library(limma)
  library(HiTIMED)
  library(EpiDISH)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(glue)
  library(AnnotationHub)
  library(ExperimentHub)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

## ── 1) SETTINGS & PATHS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
cache_dir    <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache")
beta_rds     <- file.path(cache_dir, "beta_comb_qc.rds")

if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) stop("Beta cache not found. Run preprocessing script first.")

## ── 2) LOAD DATA ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
msg("Loading β-matrix from cache...")
cache_obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
beta_comb <- if (is.list(cache_obj)) cache_obj$beta else cache_obj

## ── 3) RUN DECONVOLUTIONS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

# A) EpiScore (EpiDISH) - Generic Reference
data(centEpiFibIC.m)
common_epi <- intersect(rownames(beta_comb), rownames(centEpiFibIC.m))

msg("Running EpiScore (RPC) for Fibroblasts and Epithelial proportions...")
out.rpc <- epidish(beta_comb[common_epi, ], centEpiFibIC.m[common_epi, ], method = "RPC")
# We keep this as 0-1 (fractions)
epi_df  <- as.data.frame(out.rpc$estF) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID")

# B) HiTIMED Level 6 (COAD) - Specific Tumor Reference
msg("Running HiTIMED h=6 (COAD, tumor=TRUE)...")
hitimed_raw <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb, "COAD", h = 6) 
hitimed_df  <- as.data.frame(hitimed_raw) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID")

# Scale Alignment: Ensure HiTIMED is 0-1 (fractions)
hitimed_numeric <- hitimed_df %>% select(where(is.numeric))
if (max(hitimed_numeric, na.rm = TRUE) > 1.1) {
  msg("Adjusting HiTIMED scale from % to fraction.")
  hitimed_df <- hitimed_df %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ .x / 100))
}

## ── 4) DATA INTEGRATION & MAPPING ───────────────────────────────────────────

# Create a master comparison frame
# Critical Step: Summing HiTIMED Tumor + Epithelial to match EpiDISH 'Epi'
compare_df <- left_join(
  epi_df %>% select(SampleID, EpiScore_Epi = Epi, EpiScore_Fib = Fib, EpiScore_IC = IC),
  hitimed_df %>% mutate(HiTIMED_TotalEpi = Tumor + Epithelial) %>% 
             select(SampleID, HiTIMED_TotalEpi, HiTIMED_Tumor = Tumor, 
                    HiTIMED_NormalEpi = Epithelial, HiTIMED_Endo = Endothelial),
  by = "SampleID"
)

## ── 5) SUMMARY STATISTICS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

summary_table <- compare_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -SampleID, names_to = "Cell_Type_Metric", values_to = "Fraction") %>%
  group_by(Cell_Type_Metric) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    Mean = mean(Fraction),
    Median = median(Fraction),
    SD = sd(Fraction),
    Min = min(Fraction),
    Max = max(Fraction),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))

msg("Summary Table Created.")
print(summary_table)
write_csv(summary_table, file.path(results_root, "cell_type_comparison_stats.csv"))

## ── 6) FINAL VISUALIZATION ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

# A) Correlation Scatter Plot (The 0.815 Plot)
cor_val <- cor(compare_df$EpiScore_Epi, compare_df$HiTIMED_TotalEpi)

p1 <- ggplot(compare_df, aes(x = EpiScore_Epi, y = HiTIMED_TotalEpi)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = "black") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red", fill = "grey80") +
  annotate("text", x = min(compare_df$EpiScore_Epi) + 0.05, 
           y = max(compare_df$HiTIMED_TotalEpi) - 0.05, 
           label = paste0("R = ", round(cor_val, 3)), size = 6) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  labs(title = "Correlation of Epithelial Estimates",
       x = "EpiScore (Epi)",
       y = "HiTIMED (Tumor + Epithelial)")

# B) Distribution Boxplot
plot_data <- compare_df %>%
  select(SampleID, EpiScore_Epi, HiTIMED_TotalEpi) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -SampleID, names_to = "Method", values_to = "Proportion")

p2 <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Method, y = Proportion, fill = Method)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.3) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("EpiScore_Epi" = "#69b3a2", "HiTIMED_TotalEpi" = "#404080")) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Epithelial Fractions",
       y = "Estimated Proportion (0-1)", x = "") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# Display Plots
print(p1)
print(p2)

msg("✅ Comparison Analysis Complete. Stats saved to results folder.")

## ── 7) SAVE SUPPLEMENTAL FIGURES ─────────────────────────────────────────────

fig_dir <- file.path(results_root, "Supplemental_Figures")
dir.create(fig_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Helper: consistent PDF saving
save_pdf <- function(plot, filename, width = 6.5, height = 5.0) {
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(fig_dir, filename),
    plot = plot,
    device = cairo_pdf,   # better text embedding
    width = width,
    height = height,
    units = "in",
    dpi = 300
  )
}

save_pdf(p1, "SuppFig_S1_EpiScore_vs_HiTIMED_scatter.pdf", width = 6.5, height = 5.5)
save_pdf(p2, "SuppFig_S2_EpiScore_vs_HiTIMED_boxplot.pdf", width = 6.5, height = 5.0)

msg("✅ Supplemental PDFs saved to: ", fig_dir)
```

```{r}
## ── SUPPLEMENTARY TABLE S1: Complete Cell-Type Proportions ───────────────────

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
library(AnnotationHub)
library(ExperimentHub)
library(HiTIMED)
library(EpiDISH)
library(tidyverse)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

## ── 1) LOAD DATA ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
beta_rds     <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache/beta_comb_qc.rds")
meta_path    <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

cache_obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
beta_comb <- if (is.list(cache_obj)) cache_obj$beta else cache_obj

## ── 2) METADATA ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
meta_raw <- read_csv(meta_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

meta_DH <- meta_raw %>%
mutate(
  SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
  mets_cat = case_when(
    Distant_Mets == TRUE ~ "Distant Mets",
    (!is.na(node_stage) & node_stage > 0) | ln_only == TRUE ~ "LN Mets",
    TRUE ~ "No Mets"
  ),
  mets_cat = factor(mets_cat, levels = c("No Mets", "LN Mets", "Distant Mets"))
) %>%
filter(SampleID %in% colnames(beta_comb)) %>%
select(SampleID, mets_cat)

## ── 3) RUN DECONVOLUTIONS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# EpiDISH for Fibroblasts
msg("Running EpiDISH...")
data(centEpiFibIC.m)
common_epi <- intersect(rownames(beta_comb), rownames(centEpiFibIC.m))
out.rpc <- epidish(beta_comb[common_epi, ], centEpiFibIC.m[common_epi, ], method = "RPC")
fib_df <- as.data.frame(out.rpc$estF) %>%
rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
mutate(Fib = Fib * 100) %>%
select(SampleID, Fib)

# HiTIMED h2 for Total Immune (used for normalization)
msg("Running HiTIMED h2...")
h2_res <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb, "COAD", 2, "tumor")
h2_df <- as.data.frame(h2_res) %>%
rownames_to_column("SampleID")

# HiTIMED h3 for aggregated compartments
msg("Running HiTIMED h3...")
h3_res <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb, "COAD", 3, "tumor")
h3_df <- as.data.frame(h3_res) %>%
rownames_to_column("SampleID")

# HiTIMED h4 for Granulocytes, Mononuclear
msg("Running HiTIMED h4...")
h4_res <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb, "COAD", 4, "tumor")
h4_df <- as.data.frame(h4_res) %>%
rownames_to_column("SampleID")

# HiTIMED h6 for granular immune cells
msg("Running HiTIMED h6...")
h6_res <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb, "COAD", 6, "tumor")
h6_df <- as.data.frame(h6_res) %>%
rownames_to_column("SampleID")

## ── 4) COMBINE ALL DATA ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
msg("Combining all deconvolution results...")

# Use h6 as base for Tumor, Stromal, Epithelial, Endothelial, and granular immune
# Add Lymphocyte and Myeloid from h3 (only these two)
# Add Granulocyte and Mononuclear from h4 (only these two)
# Add Fib from EpiDISH
# Add Immune from h2

combined <- meta_DH %>%
left_join(fib_df, by = "SampleID") %>%
left_join(h2_df %>% select(SampleID, Immune), by = "SampleID") %>%
left_join(h3_df %>% select(SampleID, Lymphocyte, Myeloid), by = "SampleID") %>%
left_join(h4_df %>% select(SampleID, Granulocyte, Mononuclear), by = "SampleID") %>%
left_join(h6_df, by = "SampleID")

# Verify key columns exist
msg("Tumor present:", "Tumor" %in% names(combined))
msg("Stromal present:", "Stromal" %in% names(combined))

# Normalize immune subsets by Total Immune
immune_cols <- c("Lymphocyte", "Myeloid", "Granulocyte", "Mononuclear",
               "Bnv", "Bmem", "CD4nv", "CD4mem", "Treg", "CD8nv", "CD8mem",
               "Mono", "DC", "NK", "Bas", "Eos", "Neu")

combined <- combined %>%
mutate(across(all_of(intersect(immune_cols, names(.))),
              ~ if_else(Immune > 0 & !is.na(Immune), (.x / Immune) * 100, NA_real_),
              .names = "{.col}_norm"))

## ── 5) GENERATE SUMMARY TABLE ────────────────────────────────────────────────
msg("Generating summary statistics...")

# Define cell types
structural_cells <- c("Tumor", "Stromal", "Epithelial", "Endothelial", "Fib", "Immune")
aggregated_immune <- c("Lymphocyte_norm", "Myeloid_norm", "Granulocyte_norm", "Mononuclear_norm")
granular_immune <- c("CD4mem_norm", "CD4nv_norm", "CD8mem_norm", "CD8nv_norm", "Treg_norm",
                   "Bmem_norm", "Bnv_norm", "NK_norm",
                   "DC_norm", "Mono_norm",
                   "Bas_norm", "Eos_norm", "Neu_norm")

all_cells <- c(structural_cells, aggregated_immune, granular_immune)
all_cells <- intersect(all_cells, names(combined))

msg("Cell types included:")
print(all_cells)

# Pivot to long format
long_df <- combined %>%
pivot_longer(cols = all_of(all_cells), names_to = "Cell", values_to = "Prop") %>%
filter(!is.na(mets_cat), !is.na(Prop))

# Calculate summary statistics - Median (Min-Max)
summary_table_clean <- long_df %>%
group_by(Cell, mets_cat) %>%
summarise(
  Median = median(Prop, na.rm = TRUE),
  Min = min(Prop, na.rm = TRUE),
  Max = max(Prop, na.rm = TRUE),
  .groups = "drop"
) %>%
mutate(Value = sprintf("%.1f (%.1f-%.1f)", Median, Min, Max)) %>%
select(Cell, mets_cat, Value)

# Pivot to one column per group
supp_table_s1 <- summary_table_clean %>%
pivot_wider(
  id_cols = Cell,
  names_from = mets_cat,
  values_from = Value
)

# Clean cell names with proper labels including units
# Logical order: Tumor/Structural first, then Immune total, then immune subsets by lineage
cell_lookup <- tribble(
~old_name,          ~clean_name,                          ~order,
# Tumor and Structural (% of total)
"Tumor",            "Tumor, % of total",                  1,
"Stromal",          "Stromal, % of total",                2,
"Epithelial",       "Epithelial, % of total",             3,
"Endothelial",      "Endothelial, % of total",            4,
"Fib",              "Fibroblasts, % of total",            5,
# Total Immune
"Immune",           "Immune, % of total",                 6,
# Immune compartments (% of immune)
"Lymphocyte_norm",  "Lymphocyte, % of immune",            7,
"Myeloid_norm",     "Myeloid, % of immune",               8,
"Granulocyte_norm", "Granulocytes, % of immune",          9,
"Mononuclear_norm", "Other Mononuclear, % of immune",     10,
# T-cells (% of immune)
"CD4mem_norm",      "CD4+ T-cells (memory), % of immune", 11,
"CD4nv_norm",       "CD4+ T-cells (naive), % of immune",  12,
"CD8mem_norm",      "CD8+ T-cells (memory), % of immune", 13,
"CD8nv_norm",       "CD8+ T-cells (naive), % of immune",  14,
"Treg_norm",        "Regulatory T-cells, % of immune",    15,
# B-cells (% of immune)
"Bmem_norm",        "B-cells (memory), % of immune",      16,
"Bnv_norm",         "B-cells (naive), % of immune",       17,
# NK cells
"NK_norm",          "NK cells, % of immune",              18,
# Myeloid subsets (% of immune)
"DC_norm",          "Dendritic cells, % of immune",       19,
"Mono_norm",        "Monocytes, % of immune",             20,
# Granulocyte subsets (% of immune)
"Bas_norm",         "Basophils, % of immune",             21,
"Eos_norm",         "Eosinophils, % of immune",           22,
"Neu_norm",         "Neutrophils, % of immune",           23
)

# Apply cell name lookup and reorder
supp_table_s1 <- supp_table_s1 %>%
left_join(cell_lookup, by = c("Cell" = "old_name")) %>%
arrange(order) %>%
select(
  `Cell Type` = clean_name,
  `No Mets`,
  `LN Mets`,
  `Distant Mets`
)

# Rename columns with proper headers (line breaks for Word/Excel)
colnames(supp_table_s1) <- c(
"Cell Type",
"No Mets (n=25)\nMedian (Range)",
"LN Mets (n=13)\nMedian (Range)",
"Distant Mets (n=19)\nMedian (Range)"
)

print(supp_table_s1, n = 25)

# Save
write_csv(supp_table_s1, file.path(results_root, "Supplementary_Table_S1_CellType_ByMets.csv"))
msg("✅ Supplementary Table S1 saved!")
```
